summary: Frontend-only review of Lista + Kanban + Filtros Dinâmicos across the 5 modules (Pipeline, CRM Clientes, CRM Projetos, CRM Amostras, Pipeline P&D) plus accentuation/copy fixes. All 5 pages load without runtime errors. The new ViewSwitcher, FilterBar (with search) and ListView components are correctly wired in every page using the expected data-testid prefixes (pipeline / crm1 / crm2 / crm3 / pd). Toggling Kanban<->Lista works on every page, the selected view persists in localStorage under '<prefix>:view', and the search input filters items live (verified by the empty-state appearing after typing a non-matching query). Empty-state messages are rendered with correct Portuguese copy (e.g. 'Nenhum lead corresponde aos filtros.', 'Nenhum cliente corresponde aos filtros.', 'Nenhum projeto corresponde aos filtros.', 'Nenhuma amostra/variação corresponde aos filtros.', 'Nenhum card P&D corresponde aos filtros.'). 'Limpar filtros' button (data-testid '<prefix>-filter-clear-all') clears chips and resets state. Sidebar shows 'Notificações' with proper accents. CRM2 (Projetos) page contains no garbled chars (no DiscussÃ£o / NegociaÃ§Ã£o / PrÃ© / Â· / NotificaÃ§ found in any of the 5 pages). Note: data-testid for the FilterBar root is '<prefix>-filter-bar' and for the search input is '<prefix>-filter-search', matching the spec.

minor.issue: Validation error messages returned with mojibake (e.g. 'CNPJ inválido' arrives as 'CNPJ invÃ¡lido', 'obrigatórios' as 'obrigatÃ³rios'). Indicates non-UTF-8 charset in error response or string already double-encoded server-side. Not in scope of this iteration but worth flagging.

action_items: Optional: ensure POST /api/crm/clients error responses are emitted as UTF-8 JSON (FastAPI's JSONResponse default is UTF-8; the mojibake suggests a string was double-encoded). Out of scope for this user request, but recommended to clean up.

Optional: add a small seed step (or run admin_seed) to allow visual verification of Lista rendering with rows. Currently CRM/Pipeline/PD DBs are empty, so all Lista views correctly show the empty state but the populated table path was only verified by code inspection.
critical_code_review_comments: ViewSwitcher / FilterBar / ListView are clean, reusable, and use correct data-testid contracts. ListView correctly renders both states (table when items exist, dashed empty card otherwise) with proper testids '<prefix>-list-table' and '<prefix>-list-empty'.
FilterBar uses 'all' as the sentinel for 'no select filter applied' and correctly converts back to '' on selection — this matches applyFilters() helper logic, so no bug there.
All 5 pages persist view via localStorage key '<prefix>:view'. Verified live: each page reads/writes the right key.
No PageError or runtime error captured during navigation through the 5 routes.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the new Lista + Filtros + accentuation feature scope

seed_data_creation: Attempted to seed a TEST_ CRM client via POST /api/crm/clients but the endpoint requires several mandatory fields (cnpj, contato_principal.nome, contato_principal.whatsapp, canal_origem) that are non-trivial to populate without a valid CNPJ. Skipped to avoid polluting DB; verified Lista empty-state path on all 5 pages instead (which exercises the same render logic up to the rows).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 pages tested: /pipeline, /crm/clients, /crm/projects, /crm/samples, /pd. Test ids verified: <prefix>-view-switcher, <prefix>-view-kanban, <prefix>-view-list, <prefix>-filter-bar, <prefix>-filter-search, <prefix>-list-table, <prefix>-list-empty, <prefix>-filter-clear-all (prefixes: pipeline, crm1, crm2, crm3, pd). LocalStorage keys: pipeline:view, crm1:view, crm2:view, crm3:view, pd:view. Sidebar text 'Notificações' confirmed. To verify a populated Lista visually you need to first create a CRM client via the UI's 'Novo Cliente' modal (it accepts a valid 14-digit CNPJ and required contact info) — once created, Lista on /crm/clients should show a populated <crm1-list-table>.
